description_long: This object is a modern perfume diffuser bottle with a glossy, dark gray glass body and a cylindrical shape that gently curves at the shoulders and base. The bottle is topped with a narrow neck, from which several long, thin black diffuser reeds extend vertically. A removable cap, black with a gold or brass accent at its base, is placed beside the bottle, indicating it can be sealed when not in use. The front of the bottle features a rectangular label with a white background and gold border, displaying text in a clean, serif font. The overall design is minimalist and elegant, with a reflective surface that suggests a premium product. The bottle is compact and would fit comfortably on a tabletop or shelf in an urban environment.
description: A sleek, dark gray glass perfume diffuser bottle with black reeds and a gold-accented black cap, featuring a white and gold label on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the label, the bottle's curved silhouette, the black reeds, and the gold-accented cap placed beside it.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bottle's rounded profile and the cap's cylindrical shape, with the reeds extending upward.
description_view_2: Rear three-quarter view showing the bottle's back, the placement of the cap, and the arrangement of the reeds.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the smooth, unadorned surface of the bottle and the cluster of reeds emerging from the neck.
attribute_brand_logo: A rectangular label on the front of the bottle with a gold border and centered serif text; no distinct brand logo or emblem is visible.
attribute_bottle_cap_design: The cap is cylindrical, predominantly black with a metallic gold or brass accent at the base, and appears to be made of plastic or coated metal. It is removable and sized to fit snugly over the bottle's neck, with a smooth, glossy finish and no visible decorative engravings.
attribute_bottle_silhouette: The bottle has a rounded, cylindrical silhouette with a gently curved shoulder and base, a narrow neck, and a symmetrical, compact profile.
attribute_decorative_elements: Gold or brass accent on the cap, glossy reflective glass, and a white label with a gold border on the front.
